notes: Blog index page built with 4 placeholder posts using real service-aligned topics. All shared components imported from contract paths. Images use Unsplash with width/height set. Glass cards with hover effects, meta info, and CTA banner at bottom. Fully responsive grid (1 col mobile, 2 col tablet, 3 col desktop). Accessibility: focus rings, alt text, semantic headings, keyboard navigation. No lorem or invented facts — all content derived from site services and areas.
